course.title: Animals 🐑 — Reading
course.description: Read and practice vocabulary from "Animals 🐑" — 3 reading segments with mixed quizzes.
course.source_label: Based on Learn English with Minecraft — Ep. 10

lesson.title: Animals 🐑 — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Kenzo went on a trip to find animals for his barn. He used a boat and **leads** to bring them home. First, he found some sheep near the forest and pushed one into his boat.

Finding animals was harder at night. There were many **monsters** but no animals. Kenzo had to fight skeletons and run back to his boat. He decided to sleep and try again in the morning.

After many trips, Kenzo **captured** two cows, two sheep, and three pigs. He fed them carrots and wheat so they would breed and make baby animals. He was happy that his barn was finally full of life.
lesson.transcript_zh:
Kenzo 出发去为谷仓寻找动物。他用小船和牵引绳把它们带回家。首先，他在森林附近发现了一些羊，把一只推上了他的船。

晚上找动物更加困难。到处都是怪物，却看不到动物。Kenzo 不得不和骷髅战斗，然后跑回船上。他决定先睡觉，早上再试。

经过多次旅行，Kenzo 抓到了两头牛、两只羊和三只猪。他用胡萝卜和小麦喂它们，让它们繁殖生出小动物。他很高兴谷仓终于充满了生命。

segments.sentence_en: Kenzo went on a trip to find animals for his barn. He used a boat and **leads** to bring them home. First, he found some sheep near the forest and pushed one into his boat.
segments.sentence_zh: Kenzo 出发去为谷仓寻找动物。他用小船和牵引绳把它们带回家。首先，他在森林附近发现了一些羊，把一只推上了他的船。

segments.sentence_en: Finding animals was harder at night. There were many **monsters** but no animals. Kenzo had to fight skeletons and run back to his boat. He decided to sleep and try again in the morning.
segments.sentence_zh: 晚上找动物更加困难。到处都是怪物，却看不到动物。Kenzo 不得不和骷髅战斗，然后跑回船上。他决定先睡觉，早上再试。

quiz_payload.prompt: Why was finding animals harder at night?
options: Because there were many monsters but no animals
Because Kenzo could not see in the dark
Because the animals were sleeping
Because his boat was broken

segments.sentence_en: After many trips, Kenzo **captured** two cows, two sheep, and three pigs. He fed them carrots and wheat so they would breed and make baby animals. He was happy that his barn was finally full of life.
segments.sentence_zh: 经过多次旅行，Kenzo 抓到了两头牛、两只羊和三只猪。他用胡萝卜和小麦喂它们，让它们繁殖生出小动物。他很高兴谷仓终于充满了生命。

quiz_payload.statement: Kenzo needed only one of each animal to fill his barn.

question.prompt: What did Kenzo do to make the animals breed?

options: He fed them carrots and wheat
He built a special machine
He used magic potions
He waited for them to breed naturally

course.title: Rail System! — Reading
course.description: Read and practice vocabulary from "Rail System!" — 4 reading segments with mixed quizzes.
course.source_label: Based on Learn English with Minecraft — Ep. 14

lesson.title: Rail System! — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Kenzo wanted to build a **rail** system inside his mine so he could travel to the bottom quickly. He needed powered rails to go uphill, which required gold and redstone to craft.

He went down to the mine to search for gold. Deep underground, he found a huge cave full of monsters. A witch threw **potions** at him, and skeletons shot arrows. He had to fight carefully while collecting resources.

Back on the surface, Kenzo smelted the gold into ingots and crafted powered rails. He placed them in a pattern: six normal rails followed by two powered rails. He used redstone torches to **supply** power to the rails.

Finally, he built a minecart and tested the system. At first, the cart didn't have enough power to go uphill. He added more powered rails and tried again. This time it worked — the minecart **climbed** all the way to the top of the mine.
lesson.transcript_zh:
Kenzo 想在矿洞里建一条铁轨系统，这样他就能快速到达矿底。他需要动力铁轨来上坡，制作动力铁轨需要金锭和红石。

他下到矿洞去找金子。在地下深处，他发现了一个巨大的洞穴，里面满是怪物。女巫向他扔药水，骷髅射箭。他不得不小心战斗，同时收集资源。

回到地面后，Kenzo 把金矿熔炼成金锭，制作了动力铁轨。他按照六根普通铁轨接两根动力铁轨的规律铺设。他用红石火把给铁轨供电。

最后，他做了一辆矿车来测试系统。一开始矿车没有足够动力上坡。他增加了更多动力铁轨后再试。这一次成功了——矿车一路爬到了矿洞顶部。

segments.sentence_en: Kenzo wanted to build a **rail** system inside his mine so he could travel to the bottom quickly. He needed powered rails to go uphill, which required gold and redstone to craft.
segments.sentence_zh: Kenzo 想在矿洞里建一条铁轨系统，这样他就能快速到达矿底。他需要动力铁轨来上坡，制作动力铁轨需要金锭和红石。

segments.sentence_en: He went down to the mine to search for gold. Deep underground, he found a huge cave full of monsters. A witch threw **potions** at him, and skeletons shot arrows. He had to fight carefully while collecting resources.
segments.sentence_zh: 他下到矿洞去找金子。在地下深处，他发现了一个巨大的洞穴，里面满是怪物。女巫向他扔药水，骷髅射箭。他不得不小心战斗，同时收集资源。

quiz_payload.prompt: What materials did Kenzo need to craft powered rails?
options: Gold and redstone
Iron and coal
Diamond and lapis
Copper and string

segments.sentence_en: Back on the surface, Kenzo smelted the gold into ingots and crafted powered rails. He placed them in a pattern: six normal rails followed by two powered rails. He used redstone torches to **supply** power to the rails.
segments.sentence_zh: 回到地面后，Kenzo 把金矿熔炼成金锭，制作了动力铁轨。他按照六根普通铁轨接两根动力铁轨的规律铺设。他用红石火把给铁轨供电。

pairs.definition: To heat metal ore in a furnace to get pure metal
To make something using materials and a recipe
Having energy to move or work automatically

shuffled_defs: To make something using materials and a recipe
Having energy to move or work automatically
To heat metal ore in a furnace to get pure metal

segments.sentence_en: Finally, he built a minecart and tested the system. At first, the cart didn't have enough power to go uphill. He added more powered rails and tried again. This time it worked — the minecart **climbed** all the way to the top of the mine.
segments.sentence_zh: 最后，他做了一辆矿车来测试系统。一开始矿车没有足够动力上坡。他增加了更多动力铁轨后再试。这一次成功了——矿车一路爬到了矿洞顶部。

quiz_payload.statement: The minecart worked perfectly on the first attempt without any changes.

question.prompt: What was the main challenge Kenzo faced when building the rail system?

options: Getting enough power for the minecart to go uphill
Finding enough iron to build the rails
Keeping monsters away from the track
Building the minecart itself

course.title: Searching for Cherry Blossoms 👀 — Reading
course.description: Read and practice vocabulary from "Searching for Cherry Blossoms 👀" — 4 reading segments with mixed quizzes.
course.source_label: Based on Learn English with Minecraft — Ep. 16

lesson.title: Searching for Cherry Blossoms 👀 — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Kenzo was completely lost. In the previous episode, he had sailed far away from home searching for new biomes added in Minecraft 1.20. Now he couldn't find his way back because he had a terrible sense of **direction**.

He tried several strategies to find home. First, he climbed to the top of a mountain to look around. Then he followed his compass, but it pointed to the wrong place. Finally, he remembered a buried **treasure** map he had found near his house. By following the map to the treasure location, he eventually recognized familiar landmarks.

On his journey to find the cherry blossom biome, Kenzo explored frozen rivers, snowy landscapes, and a village where he slept for the night. He accidentally angered a **polar** bear that was protecting its baby, and had to escape by jumping into the water.

Unfortunately, Kenzo never found the cherry blossom biome in this episode. While climbing a mountain to get a better view, he was **impaled** by a stalagmite and died — ending his adventure unexpectedly.
lesson.transcript_zh:
Kenzo 彻底迷路了。在上一集里，他为了寻找 Minecraft 1.20 新增的生物群系而航行得很远。现在他找不到回家的路，因为他的方向感极差。

他尝试了几种策略找到家。首先，他爬到山顶四处张望。然后他跟着指南针走，但指南针指向了错误的地方。最后，他想起自己之前在家附近找到过一张埋藏宝藏图。通过跟着地图去寻宝的位置，他终于认出了熟悉的地标。

在寻找樱花林生物群系的路上，Kenzo 探索了结冰的河流、雪景，还有一个他过夜的村庄。他不小心惹怒了一只正在保护幼崽的北极熊，不得不跳进水里逃跑。

可惜的是，Kenzo 这一集没有找到樱花林。在爬山想要更好地观察地形时，他被钟乳石刺穿死掉了——冒险意外结束。

segments.sentence_zh: Kenzo 彻底迷路了。在上一集里，他为了寻找 Minecraft 1.20 新增的生物群系而航行得很远。现在他找不到回家的路，因为他的方向感极差。

segments.sentence_en: He tried several strategies to find home. First, he climbed to the top of a mountain to look around. Then he followed his compass, but it pointed to the wrong place. Finally, he remembered a buried **treasure** map he had found near his house.
segments.sentence_zh: 他尝试了几种策略找到家。首先，他爬到山顶四处张望。然后他跟着指南针走，但指南针指向了错误的地方。最后，他想起自己之前在家附近找到过一张埋藏宝藏图。

quiz_payload.prompt: How did Kenzo finally find his way back home?
options: By following a buried treasure map to a familiar area
By using his compass correctly
By asking villagers for directions
By building a tall tower to see his house

segments.sentence_en: On his journey to find the cherry blossom biome, Kenzo explored frozen rivers, snowy landscapes, and a village where he slept for the night. He accidentally angered a **polar** bear that was protecting its baby, and had to escape by jumping into the water.
segments.sentence_zh: 在寻找樱花林生物群系的路上，Kenzo 探索了结冰的河流、雪景，还有一个他过夜的村庄。他不小心惹怒了一只正在保护幼崽的北极熊，不得不跳进水里逃跑。

pairs.definition: A large area with its own climate, plants, and animals
The visible features of an area of land
Without meaning to; by mistake

shuffled_defs: The visible features of an area of land

A large area with its own climate, plants, and animals

segments.sentence_en: Unfortunately, Kenzo never found the cherry blossom biome in this episode. While climbing a mountain to get a better view, he was **impaled** by a stalagmite and died — ending his adventure unexpectedly.
segments.sentence_zh: 可惜的是，Kenzo 这一集没有找到樱花林。在爬山想要更好地观察地形时，他被钟乳石刺穿死掉了——冒险意外结束。

quiz_payload.statement: Kenzo successfully found the cherry blossom biome at the end of his journey.

question.prompt: What is the main theme of this episode?

options: Getting lost and searching for a new biome without success
Building a new house near cherry blossom trees
Fighting dangerous monsters in a frozen biome
Exploring an underwater temple

lesson.title: Fishing! 🐟 — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Kenzo built a fishing hut near the river. He made a **fishing** rod using sticks and string. Fishing was a peaceful way to get food without fighting monsters.

While fishing, Kenzo caught many things. He caught salmon, cod, and even a **puffer** fish. He also caught some strange treasures like enchanted bows and name tags.

Kenzo learned that fishing is very useful in Minecraft. You can get food to eat and rare **items** that are hard to find anywhere else. He spent a whole day fishing and collected many useful things.
lesson.transcript_zh:
Kenzo 在河边建了一个钓鱼小屋。他用木棍和线做了一根钓鱼竿。钓鱼是一种不用打怪就能获得食物的和平方式。

钓鱼的时候，Kenzo 钓到了很多东西。他钓到了三文鱼、鳕鱼，甚至还有一条河豚。他还钓到了一些奇怪的宝物，比如附魔弓和命名牌。

Kenzo 学到了钓鱼在 Minecraft 里非常有用。你可以得到食物吃，还能钓到在其他地方很难找到的稀有物品。他花了一整天钓鱼，收集了很多有用的东西。

quiz_payload.prompt: What special items did Kenzo catch while fishing?
options: Enchanted bows and name tags
Diamonds and gold
A saddle and armor
A map and compass

segments.sentence_en: Kenzo learned that fishing is very useful in Minecraft. You can get food to eat and rare **items** that are hard to find anywhere else. He spent a whole day fishing and collected many useful things.
segments.sentence_zh: Kenzo 学到了钓鱼在 Minecraft 里非常有用。你可以得到食物吃，还能钓到在其他地方很难找到的稀有物品。他花了一整天钓鱼，收集了很多有用的东西。

quiz_payload.statement: Fishing only gives you fish and nothing else.

question.prompt: Why is fishing useful in Minecraft?

options: You can get both food and rare items
It makes you level up faster
Fish can be used to tame cats
It is the only way to get string

course.title: Finishing my House! 🏠 — Reading
course.description: Read and practice vocabulary from "Finishing my House! 🏠" — 4 reading segments with mixed quizzes.
course.source_label: Based on Learn English with Minecraft — Ep. 20

lesson.title: Finishing my House! 🏠 — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Kenzo was far from home on a sunken ship when this episode began. A previous video had become **corrupted**, so he lost his progress from that recording. On the ship, he found smithing templates, bamboo, potatoes, and a buried treasure map.

Back home, his house was almost finished. He had completed the roof and stone floor, and started building chests upstairs. He needed to collect sand to make glass for the **windows**. Using shovels, he gathered a large amount of sand from a nearby beach.

While the sand was smelting into glass in the furnace, Kenzo showed his mine. Deep underground, it connected to a cave system with stalactites, an abandoned mineshaft, and even a deep dark city — an **underground** area with a dangerous boss called the Warden.

With 48 glass panes crafted, Kenzo installed all the windows. His house was finally complete with a beautiful view of the river and mountains. He even found buried treasure containing diamonds, emeralds, and a heart of the sea to **celebrate** finishing his home.
lesson.transcript_zh:
这一集开始时，Kenzo 远在一艘沉船上。之前录的一期视频文件损坏了，所以他丢失了那次的进度。在沉船上，他找到了锻造模板、竹子、土豆和一张埋藏宝藏图。

回到家后，房子已经快完工了。他完成了屋顶和石地板，楼上也开始放箱子了。他需要收集沙子来做窗户用的玻璃。他用铁锹从附近的沙滩上挖了大量的沙子。

沙子在熔炉里烧成玻璃的同时，Kenzo 展示了他的矿洞。在地下深处，矿洞连通了一个有钟乳石的洞穴系统、一座废弃矿井，甚至还有一座深暗之城——一个有危险 Boss 监守者的地下区域。

做好 48 块玻璃板后，Kenzo 把所有窗户都安装好了。他的房子终于完工了，能看到河流和群山的美景。他还找到了埋藏的宝藏，里面有钻石、绿宝石和海洋之心，庆祝房子完工。

quiz_payload.prompt: What did Kenzo need sand for?
options: To smelt into glass for windows
To build a path to the beach
To fill holes in the floor
To trade with villagers

quiz_payload.statement: Kenzo needed a diamond pickaxe to enter the deep dark city.

question.prompt: What were the two main accomplishments in this episode?

options: Finishing the house windows and finding buried treasure
Defeating the Warden and getting diamonds
Building a new mine and finding gold

course.title: Exploring a Cave — Reading
course.description: Read and practice vocabulary from "Exploring a Cave" — 3 reading segments with mixed quizzes.
course.source_label: Based on Learn English with Minecraft — Ep. 2

lesson.title: Exploring a Cave — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Kenzo had two goals for this episode. He wanted to **explore** a cave to find valuable resources like iron and coal. He also wanted to finish the windows on his house.

He started **digging** down into his mine. It was very dark without torches. Finally, he found coal and used it to make torches. Now he could see! He kept digging deeper, looking for iron.

Deep underground, Kenzo discovered a huge cave system. He found lapis lazuli, redstone, and iron. But it was very dangerous — skeletons shot arrows at him and he almost fell into lava. He had to use all his **tools** and skills to survive.
lesson.transcript_zh:
Kenzo 这一集有两个目标。他想探索一个洞穴，寻找铁和煤等有用的资源。他还想把房子的窗户做好。

他开始往矿里向下挖。没有火把的时候非常黑暗。终于，他找到了煤，用它做了火把。现在他能看见了！他继续往更深处挖，寻找铁矿。

在地下深处，Kenzo 发现了一个巨大的洞穴系统。他找到了青金石、红石和铁。但那里非常危险——骷髅向他射箭，他差点掉进岩浆。他不得不用尽所有工具和技能才能活下来。

segments.sentence_en: Kenzo had two goals for this episode. He wanted to **explore** a cave to find valuable resources like iron and coal. He also wanted to finish the windows on his house.
segments.sentence_zh: Kenzo 这一集有两个目标。他想探索一个洞穴，寻找铁和煤等有用的资源。他还想把房子的窗户做好。

segments.sentence_en: He started **digging** down into his mine. It was very dark without torches. Finally, he found coal and used it to make torches. Now he could see! He kept digging deeper, looking for iron.

quiz_payload.prompt: What did Kenzo need coal for?

To build armor for protection
To trade with villagers
To cook food for energy

segments.sentence_en: Deep underground, Kenzo discovered a huge cave system. He found lapis lazuli, redstone, and iron. But it was very dangerous — skeletons shot arrows at him and he almost fell into lava. He had to use all his **tools** and skills to survive.

quiz_payload.statement: The cave was completely safe with no monsters.

question.prompt: What did Kenzo accomplish in this episode?

options: He explored a cave and finished his house windows

He built a nether portal

lesson.title: Bamboo 🎍 — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Kenzo built a path from his house that split in two directions. One led to his garden, and the other led to a deep hole connecting directly to his XP farm below. He could now jump down quickly instead of walking a long **staircase**.

The XP farm used a spider spawner. When Kenzo removed the torches, it became dark enough for spiders to spawn. He killed them with his sword to gain **experience** points. However, the spiders sometimes got stuck at the top and could hit him through the walls.

Kenzo organized all his chests by category — soil, stone, building supplies, tools, food, and monster drops. He also harvested a massive crop of potatoes from his garden. There were so many potatoes that he couldn't carry them all in his **inventory**.

For the final task, Kenzo sailed to a nearby jungle to collect bamboo for building a bamboo house. He also tamed a parrot by feeding it seeds. On his way home in the dark, he got lost and was chased by skeletons, but eventually found his way back **safely**.

lesson.title: Nether Portal — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Kenzo finished building his enchantment room with a dirt roof. He planned to place moss on the roof, which would slowly **spread** to the surrounding dirt blocks and turn the entire roof green to match the bamboo decorations below.

To fill the room, he needed bookshelves and an enchanting table. Bookshelves required books, which were made from leather and paper. He collected 63 sugarcane stalks and converted them into paper, then combined the paper with leather to craft 46 books and 15 **bookshelves**.

For the enchanting table, Kenzo needed obsidian. He remembered seeing trees on fire near the jungle, which meant lava was nearby on the surface. He found a large pool of lava, poured water on it to create obsidian, and mined 14 blocks with his diamond **pickaxe**.

With all the materials ready, Kenzo built a Nether portal using obsidian and lit it with flint and steel. Then he placed the enchanting table surrounded by 15 bookshelves inside the enchantment room. Now he could enchant all his diamond tools and armor using **experience** from his XP farm.

Kenzo 用泥土做屋顶完成了附魔房的建造。他计划在屋顶放苔藓，苔藓会慢慢蔓延到周围的泥土块，让整个屋顶变成绿色，与下方的竹子装饰相匹配。

为了填充房间，他需要书架和附魔台。书架需要书，书由皮革和纸制成。他收集了 63 根甘蔗并转化成纸，然后将纸和皮革组合做出 46 本书和 15 个书架。

做附魔台需要黑曜石。Kenzo 记得丛林附近有树着火，说明地表有岩浆。他找到了一大池岩浆，倒水上去生成黑曜石，用钻石镐挖了 14 块。

材料准备齐全后，Kenzo 用黑曜石建了一个下界传送门，用打火石点燃。然后他在附魔房里放上附魔台和 15 个书架。现在他可以用 XP 农场获得的经验值来给所有钻石工具和护甲附魔了。

lesson.passage_md:
Kenzo finally used his XP farm to enchant his diamond tools. He waited in the spider spawner room, killing spiders until he reached level 30. The spiders sometimes got stuck at the top of the farm, which was a **frustrating** problem he needed to fix.

At the enchanting table, he placed his diamond pickaxe with lapis lazuli and received an amazing enchantment: Efficiency IV, Fortune II, and Unbreaking III. This made his pickaxe incredibly **powerful** for mining ore and collecting extra resources.

He continued enchanting more items. His diamond sword received Knockback II and Sharpness enchantments. His diamond helmet got Fire Protection III, Unbreaking, and Respiration. He even built and enchanted a **crossbow** with Piercing IV.

Kenzo also showed his finished automatic bamboo and sugarcane farm. It had three floors of bamboo and three floors of sugarcane, all collected automatically into a chest. He planned to use his enchanted equipment to go exploring underground and find enough diamonds for a complete set of diamond **armor**.

Kenzo 终于用了他的 XP 农场来给钻石工具附魔。他在蜘蛛刷怪笼房间里等待，砍杀蜘蛛直到升到 30 级。蜘蛛有时会卡在农场顶部，这是一个令人沮丧的问题，他需要解决。

在附魔台前，他放上钻石镐和青金石，获得了一个很棒的附魔：效率 IV、时运 II 和耐久 III。这让他的镐在挖矿和收集额外资源时变得非常强大。

course.title: Diamond Mine! 💎💎 — Reading

course.source_label: Based on Learn English with Minecraft — Ep. 30

lesson.title: Diamond Mine! 💎💎 — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
With his newly enchanted diamond boots giving him Protection III, Kenzo was ready to explore deep underground. He also discovered that a smoker could cook food faster than a regular furnace, so he built one using logs and a **furnace**.

During his exploration, Kenzo found a village where he collected emeralds and bread. He also discovered a ravine with a dangerous lava pool at the bottom. He accidentally fell near the lava and caught fire, but managed to find water just in time to **survive**.

The biggest discovery was an abandoned mineshaft filled with diamonds. His enchanted pickaxe with Fortune II helped him collect extra gems from each ore block. He found 11 diamonds in one area alone — more than in his entire previous video. However, cave spiders kept poisoning him, making the **exploration** very risky.

By the end of his adventure, Kenzo had collected an impressive 32 diamonds total. He planned to use them to craft a complete set of diamond armor. The Fortune enchantment on his pickaxe proved **essential** for maximizing his diamond collection from each ore block.
lesson.transcript_zh:
穿上附有保护 III 的钻石靴，Kenzo 准备好去地下深处探险。他还发现熏炉比普通熔炉烤食物更快，于是用原木和熔炉做了一个。

探险过程中，Kenzo 找到了一个村庄，收集了绿宝石和面包。他还发现了一条峡谷，底部有危险的岩浆池。他不小心掉到岩浆附近着了火，但及时找到水活了下来。

最大的发现是一座废弃矿井，里面充满了钻石。他附有时运 II 的镐帮助他从每块矿石中收集更多宝石。仅在一个区域他就找到了 11 颗钻石——比上一集整集找到的还多。但洞穴蜘蛛不断毒他，让探险非常危险。

冒险结束时，Kenzo 总共收集了令人印象深刻的 32 颗钻石。他计划用它们制作一套完整的钻石护甲。镐上的时运附魔证明对从每块矿石中最大化钻石收集至关重要。

course.title: Taming a Horse! 🐎 — Reading
course.description: Read and practice vocabulary from "Taming a Horse! 🐎" — 5 reading segments with mixed quizzes.
course.source_label: Based on Learn English with Minecraft — Ep. 33

lesson.title: Taming a Horse! 🐎 — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Unfortunately, Kenzo's baby zombie pigman friend had **vanished** from his house. Despite this sad news, he had two goals: build a stable for horses, and find and tame a horse using the saddles and diamond horse armor he found in the Nether fortress.

Kenzo built the stable next to his barn using cherry wood. He experimented with the dimensions, eventually settling on three blocks wide by four blocks long. He decorated it with stripped logs, stairs for the roof, lanterns, trapdoors, and fence gates on both sides for **convenient** access.

Finding apples to tame the horse proved surprisingly difficult. Kenzo spent an entire day chopping cherry trees before realizing that apples only drop from oak trees, not cherry trees. He felt embarrassed about this mistake but eventually collected four apples from nearby **oak** trees.

With apples in hand, Kenzo found a horse and fed it all four apples. The horse was **successfully** tamed on his first riding attempt. He equipped it with the saddle and diamond horse armor, making it look magnificent.

However, when Kenzo tried to bring the horse into the stable, it wouldn't fit through the entrance. He had to **demolish** part of the doorway to make it two blocks wide, learning that horses need wider passages than players do.
lesson.transcript_zh:
不幸的是，Kenzo 的小僵尸猪人朋友从家里消失了。尽管这个坏消息很难过，他还是有两个目标：建一个马厩，以及用他在下界堡垒找到的马鞍和钻石马铠去找并驯服一匹马。

Kenzo 用樱花木在谷仓旁边建了马厩。他尝试了不同的尺寸，最终确定为三格宽四格长。他用去皮原木、楼梯做屋顶、灯笼、活板门和两侧的栅栏门来装饰，方便进出。

找苹果来驯马意外地困难。Kenzo 花了一整天砍樱花树，然后才意识到苹果只会从橡树上掉落，不是樱花树。他对这个错误感到尴尬，但最终从附近的橡树上收集了四个苹果。

拿着苹果，Kenzo 找到了一匹马并喂了它四个苹果。马在他第一次骑上时就被成功驯服了。他给马装上马鞍和钻石马铠，看起来非常威风。

然而，当 Kenzo 试图把马带进马厩时，马进不去。他不得不拆掉部分门口让它变成两格宽，这才知道马需要比玩家更宽的通道。

course.title: Finding a Stronghold — Reading

course.source_label: Based on Learn English with Minecraft — Ep. 36

lesson.title: Finding a Stronghold — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Kenzo's ultimate goal was to find a stronghold, which contains the End Portal needed to reach the final dimension and fight the Ender Dragon. To locate it, he needed Eyes of Ender — crafted from ender pearls and blaze powder — which float toward the **stronghold** when thrown into the air.

The journey was long and dangerous. Kenzo threw Eyes of Ender repeatedly, following their direction across vast oceans and unfamiliar terrain. Some eyes shattered upon use, which concerned him because he had a **limited** supply of materials to craft more.

After traveling far from home, the Eyes of Ender began pointing downward instead of forward, indicating the stronghold was directly below. Kenzo started digging straight down — a risky strategy that experienced players typically **discourage** because of potential lava or deep falls.

Deep underground, Kenzo finally broke through into the stronghold's stone brick corridors. He explored the maze-like structure, finding libraries filled with bookshelves, mysterious silverfish spawners, and eventually the portal room itself — a dark chamber with an **incomplete** End Portal frame.

The End Portal required twelve Eyes of Ender to activate. Some frames already contained eyes, but Kenzo needed to place the remaining ones himself. He carefully counted the empty slots and placed each eye, knowing that once **activated**, the portal would transport him to the most dangerous dimension in the game.
lesson.transcript_zh:
Kenzo 的终极目标是找到要塞，里面有通往最终维度的末地传送门，用来打败末影龙。为了定位要塞，他需要末影之眼——用末影珠和烈焰粉制作——抛向空中时会飘向要塞方向。

旅程漫长而危险。Kenzo 反复抛出末影之眼，跟着它们的方向穿越广阔的海洋和陌生的地形。有些末影之眼使用后会碎裂，这让他担心，因为他制作更多的材料有限。

走了很远之后，末影之眼开始朝下方指而不是向前，表明要塞就在正下方。Kenzo 开始向下挖——这是一个冒险的策略，有经验的玩家通常不推荐这样做，因为可能会碰到岩浆或深坑。

在地下深处，Kenzo 终于挖穿进入了要塞的石砖走廊。他探索了迷宫般的结构，发现了填满书架的图书馆、神秘的融虫刷怪笼，最终找到了传送门房间——一个漆黑的房间，里面有一个不完整的末地传送门框架。

末地传送门需要十二颗末影之眼才能激活。一些框架已经含有末影之眼，但 Kenzo 需要自己放置剩余的。他仔细数空槽并放入每颗眼睛，知道一旦激活，传送门将把他传送到游戏中最危险的维度。

course.title: THE END — Reading
course.description: Read and practice vocabulary from "THE END" — 5 reading segments with mixed quizzes.
course.source_label: Based on Learn English with Minecraft — Ep. 38

lesson.title: THE END — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
After weeks of preparation, Kenzo was finally ready to enter the End and face the Ender Dragon. He brought his best enchanted diamond equipment, plenty of food, and building blocks for the **inevitable** tower climbing he would need to do.

The End dimension was a dark, floating island surrounded by an endless void. Obsidian pillars topped with End Crystals rose high into the sky. These crystals continuously healed the dragon, so Kenzo needed to destroy them first. Some crystals were protected by iron cages, requiring him to climb the pillars and break the cages before he could **eliminate** each crystal.

The Ender Dragon was enormous and terrifying. It circled the island, diving at Kenzo and knocking him backward with tremendous force. He had to time his attacks carefully, hitting the dragon only when it perched on the central fountain. Between attacks, he ate food to **regenerate** his health.

Destroying the final crystal made the dragon vulnerable. Without healing, each hit from Kenzo's enchanted sword dealt significant damage. The dragon made increasingly **desperate** attacks, but Kenzo dodged them and kept striking until the dragon finally exploded into thousands of experience points.

With the Ender Dragon defeated, a portal back to the Overworld appeared, along with the Dragon Egg — the rarest trophy in the game. Kenzo had **accomplished** his ultimate goal after more than thirty episodes of learning English with Minecraft.
lesson.transcript_zh:
经过数周的准备，Kenzo 终于准备好进入末地并面对末影龙。他带了最好的附魔钻石装备、充足的食物，以及用于爬塔的建筑方块。

末地维度是一座黑暗的浮岛，四周是无尽的虚空。黑曜石柱顶端放着末影水晶，高耸入云。这些水晶不断治疗龙，所以 Kenzo 需要先摧毁它们。有些水晶被铁笼保护，他需要爬上柱子打破铁笼才能消灭每个水晶。

末影龙巨大而可怕。它绕岛盘旋，俯冲向 Kenzo 并以巨大力量将他击退。他必须仔细把握攻击时机，只在龙停在中央喷泉上时才能攻击。攻击间隙他吃食物恢复血量。

摧毁最后一个水晶使龙变得脆弱。没有了治疗，Kenzo 的附魔剑每一击都造成巨大伤害。龙越来越拼命地攻击，但 Kenzo 躲开并不断砍击，直到龙最终爆炸成万千经验值。

末影龙被打败后，一个回到主世界的传送门出现了，还有龙蛋——游戏中最稀有的战利品。Kenzo 在三十多集的用 Minecraft 学英语后，终于完成了他的终极目标。

course.title: Exploring the Wild 🧭 — Reading

lesson.title: Exploring the Wild 🧭 — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Kenzo decided to go on an **adventure** far from his house. He wanted to explore the wild areas and find new things. He took his sword, some food, and his boat.

He sailed across the water and found new lands with tall mountains and deep rivers. He saw many **animals** like pigs, cows, and sheep. He also found a jungle with parrots and pandas.

But exploring was not easy. Kenzo got lost several times because he did not have a map. When night came, he had to **survive** against zombies and creepers. He learned that exploring is exciting but also very dangerous.
lesson.transcript_zh:
Kenzo 决定去离家很远的地方冒险。他想探索野外，寻找新的东西。他带上了剑、一些食物和小船。

他划船穿过水面，发现了有着高山和深河的新大陆。他看到了很多动物，比如猪、牛和羊。他还发现了一片有鹦鹉和熊猫的丛林。

但探索并不容易。Kenzo 好几次迷路了，因为他没有地图。夜晚来临时，他不得不对抗僵尸和苦力怕求生。他学到了探索虽然令人兴奋，但也非常危险。

lesson.title: Making Friends? — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Kenzo wanted to make **friends** in Minecraft. He found a village with many villagers. The villagers had different jobs — some were farmers, some were librarians, and some were blacksmiths.

Kenzo tried to **trade** with the villagers. He gave them emeralds and they gave him useful items like bread, armor, and books. Trading was a good way to get things he needed.

He also found some **animals** that he wanted to tame. He used seeds to attract chickens and wheat to attract cows. Soon he had many animal friends following him around his base.
lesson.transcript_zh:
Kenzo 想在 Minecraft 里交朋友。他找到了一个有很多村民的村庄。村民们有不同的工作——有的是农民，有的是图书管理员，有的是铁匠。

Kenzo 试着和村民做交易。他给他们绿宝石，他们给他面包、盔甲和书等有用的物品。交易是获得所需物品的好方法。

他还发现了一些想要驯服的动物。他用种子吸引鸡，用小麦吸引牛。很快他就有很多动物朋友跟着他在基地周围转了。

lesson.title: Building a Barn! — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Kenzo decided to **build** a big barn for his animals. He needed a lot of wood, so he chopped down many trees. He felt bad about cutting the trees, but he planted new saplings so they would grow back.

The barn was a large building with a stone **roof** and wooden walls. Kenzo worked very hard to finish it. He used stairs for the roof and fences for the animal pens inside.

When the barn was finished, it was completely **empty**. Kenzo planned to fill it with cows, sheep, pigs, and chickens in his next adventure. He was proud of his new building.
lesson.transcript_zh:
Kenzo 决定为他的动物建一个大谷仓。他需要很多木头，所以砍了很多树。他为砍树感到愧疚，但他种下了新树苗，这样树会重新长出来。

谷仓是一座有石头屋顶和木墙的大建筑。Kenzo 非常努力地完成了它。他用楼梯做屋顶，用围栏做里面的动物圈。

谷仓建好后，里面完全是空的。Kenzo 计划在下一次冒险中把牛、羊、猪和鸡带回来填满它。他为自己的新建筑感到自豪。

lesson.passage_md:
Kenzo started a new Minecraft world called Fish Land. He wanted to find a place near the **ocean** so he could travel by boat. He also needed to be close to a **forest** because he needed a lot of wood.

He found a good spot near a village, a river, and some trees. He started to **build** a basic shelter on the beach. He used wood to make planks, a crafting table, and stone tools.

When night came, **monsters** appeared everywhere. Kenzo had to fight skeletons and spiders with his sword. He ran to the village to find a bed. In the morning, the monsters burned in the sunlight and he was safe again.

他找到了一个好地方，靠近村庄、河流和树林。他开始在沙滩上建造一个简易避难所。他用木头做成木板、工作台和石制工具。

当夜晚来临时，怪物到处出现。Kenzo 不得不用剑跟骷髅和蜘蛛战斗。他跑到村庄找了一张床。早上，怪物在阳光下燃烧，他又安全了。

lesson.title: Intermediate English - Minecraft #1 — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
Kenzo started a brand new Minecraft world for his intermediate English series. Unlike his beginner episodes, this series used more complex vocabulary and faster-paced **narration** to challenge viewers who already had basic English skills.

His first priority was establishing a base of operations. He gathered wood, crafted essential tools, and built a small shelter before nightfall. The process required careful **prioritization** — he needed to balance collecting resources with building protection against the monsters that would appear after dark.

During his exploration, Kenzo encountered various biomes including forests, plains, and mountains. He explained the characteristics of each biome and discussed the strategic **advantages** of settling in different locations. Eventually, he chose a spot near water and a forest for optimal resource access.

As night fell, Kenzo experienced the full danger of survival mode. Creepers, skeletons, and zombies surrounded his basic shelter. He had to defend himself while simultaneously trying to upgrade his tools and armor — a challenging **multitasking** exercise that tested both his gaming and English skills.

By the end of the episode, Kenzo had established a functional base with basic amenities. He reflected on the differences between this series and his beginner content, noting that the vocabulary and sentence structures would become **progressively** more advanced as the series continued.

他的首要任务是建立一个操作基地。他收集木材，制作必要工具，并在天黑前建了一个小避难所。这个过程需要仔细的优先级排序——他需要在收集资源和建造防御工事之间取得平衡。

探索过程中，Kenzo 遇到了各种生物群系，包括森林、平原和山脉。他解释了每个生物群系的特征，并讨论了在不同位置定居的战略优势。最终，他选择了一个靠近水和森林的地点，以获得最佳的资源获取。

夜幕降临时，Kenzo 体验到了生存模式的全部危险。苦力怕、骷髅和僵尸包围了他的简陋避难所。他必须一边防御一边升级工具和护甲——这是一个具有挑战性的多任务练习。

lesson.title: Intermediate English - Minecraft #10 — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
In the tenth episode of his intermediate series, Kenzo prepared for what he described as the most **consequential** adventure yet — entering the Nether dimension for the first time. The Nether is a hellish landscape filled with lava, dangerous terrain, and powerful hostile creatures.

Before entering the portal, Kenzo made thorough preparations. He crafted extra tools, brought abundant food, and ensured he had fire resistance potions. He emphasized that **inadequate** preparation was the most common reason players die in the Nether, losing all their valuable items.

The Nether was overwhelming. Rivers of lava flowed between massive formations of netherrack, while ghasts — enormous floating creatures — shot explosive fireballs from the sky. Kenzo had to **simultaneously** navigate treacherous terrain and dodge incoming attacks.

His primary objective was finding a Nether fortress, which contained blaze spawners. Blaze rods dropped by blazes are essential for crafting Eyes of Ender, which would eventually lead him to the End Portal. The fortress was **fortified** with dark brick corridors and populated by dangerous wither skeletons.

After a harrowing battle at the blaze spawner, Kenzo collected enough blaze rods to continue his journey. He reflected on how far his English had come since the beginning of the series, noting that his ability to describe complex situations and express **abstract** concepts had improved significantly.
lesson.transcript_zh:
在中级系列的第十集中，Kenzo 准备进行他所说的最关键的冒险——第一次进入下界维度。下界是一个充满岩浆、危险地形和强大敌对生物的地狱般景观。

进入传送门前，Kenzo 做了充分的准备。他制作了额外的工具，带了充足的食物，并确保有抗火药水。他强调，准备不足是玩家死在下界的最常见原因，会失去所有贵重物品。

下界令人应接不暇。岩浆河流淌在巨大的下界岩层之间，恶魂——巨大的漂浮生物——从空中发射爆炸性火球。Kenzo 必须同时应对危险地形和躺避来袭的攻击。

他的主要目标是找到下界堡垒，里面有烈焰人刷怪笼。烈焰人掉落的烈焰棒是制作末影之眼的关键材料，最终会引导他找到末地传送门。堡垒由深色砖块走廊构成，里面住着危险的凋灵骷髅。

在烈焰人刷怪笼旁经历了一场惊心动魄的战斗后，Kenzo 收集了足够的烈焰棒继续他的旅程。他反思了自己的英语从系列开始以来进步了多少，注意到他描述复杂情况和表达抽象概念的能力已经显著提高。

lesson.passage_md:
In this intermediate episode, Kenzo undertook an **ambitious** mining expedition deep underground. His goal was to find enough diamonds to craft a complete set of diamond armor and tools, which would be essential for surviving the more dangerous areas of the game.

The mining strategy involved strip mining at level -59, which is considered the optimal depth for diamond **distribution**. Kenzo dug long tunnels with branches spaced two blocks apart, maximizing his chances of exposing diamond ore while minimizing wasted effort.

During his excavation, Kenzo discovered a massive cave system filled with hostile mobs. The cave contained valuable resources but was extremely dangerous. He had to navigate through narrow passages while fighting off cave spiders whose poison could **gradually** drain his health over time.

After hours of mining, Kenzo collected enough diamonds to craft a full set of armor. He explained the **significance** of each piece — the helmet provides water breathing, the chestplate offers the most protection, leggings balance defense with mobility, and boots can be enchanted with feather falling.

Returning to the surface, Kenzo enchanted his new diamond gear at the enchanting table. He discussed how different enchantments **complement** each other, creating powerful combinations that would prepare him for the challenges ahead.
lesson.transcript_zh:
在这集中级节目中，Kenzo 进行了一次雄心勃勃的地下深处挖矿远征。他的目标是找到足够的钻石来制作一套完整的钻石护甲和工具，这对于在更危险的区域生存至关重要。

挖矿策略是在 -59 层进行带状挖矿，这被认为是钻石分布的最佳深度。Kenzo 挖了很长的隋道，分支每隔两格，最大化暴露钻石矿的机会，同时减少浪费的劳动。

挖掘过程中，Kenzo 发现了一个巨大的洞穴系统，里面充满敌对生物。洞穴包含宝贵资源但极其危险。他必须在狭窄的通道中穿行，同时打击能逐渐消耗他血量的洞穴蜘蛛。

经过数小时的挖矿，Kenzo 收集了足够的钻石来制作一套完整的护甲。他解释了每件装备的重要性——头盔提供水下呼吸，胸甲提供最多保护，护腿在防御和机动性之间取得平衡，靴子可以附魔缓降。

回到地面后，Kenzo 在附魔台上给新的钻石装备附魔。他讨论了不同的附魔如何互相补充，创造出强大的组合，为接下来的挑战做准备。
